description: RESEARCHER_A acquires INTRO_SECTION and METHODS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_B acquires METHODS_SECTION and RESULTS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
RESEARCHER_C acquires INTRO_SECTION and RESULTS_SECTION one at a time (sequential acquisition)
Each researcher reads literature and drafts locally before acquiring section locks

Circular wait: RESEARCHER_A holds INTRO_SECTION waiting for METHODS_SECTION, RESEARCHER_B holds METHODS_SECTION waiting for RESULTS_SECTION, RESEARCHER_C holds RESULTS_SECTION waiting for INTRO_SECTION
